T-MSIS TAF Annual Provider RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.3 
38 
MLT_SNGL_SPCLTY_GRP_TXNMY_IND 
LABEL: 
Multi- or Single-Specialty Group Taxonomy Indicator — Ever in Calendar Year 
DESCRIPTION: Indicates whether the provider’s taxonomy value maps to the multi or single specialty group service 
provider category; ever in the calendar year. 
SHORT NAME: MLT_SNGL_SPCLTY_GRP_TXNMY_IND 
LONG NAME: MLT_SNGL_SPCLTY_GRP_TXNMY_IND 
TYPE:
